# iotcALB

`iotcALB` supports the Management Strategy Evaluation (MSE) process for
Indian Ocean albacore tuna (*Thunnus alalunga*), managed by the [Indian
Ocean Tuna Commission (IOTC)](https://www.iotc.org).

## Installation

``` r

# install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("Blue-Matter/iotcALB")
```

# Package index

## All functions

- [`Cond_BaseCase`](https://iotcalb.bluematterscience.com/pkg/reference/Cond_BaseCase.md)
  : Base-case operating model conditioning data for Indian Ocean
  Albacore
- [`ExpandAgeSeason()`](https://iotcalb.bluematterscience.com/pkg/reference/ExpandAgeSeason.md)
  : Expand an annual-age-by-season schedule onto quarterly age classes
- [`ImportOM()`](https://iotcalb.bluematterscience.com/pkg/reference/ImportOM.md)
  : Import an MSEtool OM from IOTC Albacore conditioning output
- [`ValidateOM()`](https://iotcalb.bluematterscience.com/pkg/reference/ValidateOM.md)
  : Compare OM N-at-age against conditioning model reference
